prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第48名，近年排名稳定在44–53区间，属中上游211；2026年声誉评价偏正面，硕士报考热度高（预估报考人数突破1.5万），教育学领域人气旺盛；抖音热度总排名第67（一般），2024年曾进入高热榜第13名，近年关注度有所回落；未见投档断档或异常记录；马克思主义理论A+、世界史A+、教育学A+、统计学A、生物学A-、生态学A-，共6个A-及以上学科，师范类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业热度2024年评估为分化观望，较2022年高点有所降温；山东省2026年考生总数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约5.7%，竞争加剧；东北师范大学位于吉林长春，属跨省招生；在山东省招生占比约5%（2021–2025年分别为77/74/70/48/46人），非该校主要生源地，地域偏好中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划扩招17.4%缓解竞争压力、山东省考生增加5.7%加剧竞争、声誉偏正面吸引报考等因素，在供需弹性主值44788名基础上小幅修正，预计2026年最低位次约44588名，区间44088–45088名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约44588名，区间44088–45088名。位次在区间下限44088以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（马克思主义理论A+、历史学A+）；位次在区间中段建议以二档为主（数学与应用数学、计算机类、经济学双学位）；位次在区间上限附近建议以三档保底（生物科学A-、数据科学等），注意新闻传播学类社会热度明显劝退，报考需谨慎。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking approximately shifted from 25842 → 29272 → 37053 → 46081 → 40556, showing a continuous backward trend overall. It peaked at 46081 in 2024 and rebounded to 40556 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 11,000 places over the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 40556. The provincial enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 77 → 74 → 70 → 48 → 46, continuously decreasing. The 2026 plan is 54, an increase of 8 students (+17.4%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 48th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable range of 44–53 in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive, with high enthusiasm for master's degree applications (estimated to exceed 15,000 applicants), and strong popularity in the field of education. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranking is 67th (average), but it once entered the top 13 hot list in 2024, though attention has declined in recent years. No records of admission gaps or anomalies have been observed. It has 6 A- or above disciplines: Marxist Theory A+, World History A+, Education A+, Statistics A, Biology A-, and Ecology A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher-training/education majors in 2024 is assessed as polarized and wait-and-see, cooling down from the peak in 2022. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Shandong Province is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from 681,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin, and recruits across provinces. Its enrollment proportion in Shandong is about 5% (77/74/70/48/46 from 2021 to 2025), not a major source of students, with neutral regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 17.4% enrollment expansion in 2026 to ease competition pressure, the 5.7% increase in Shandong examinees intensifying competition, and the positive reputation attracting applicants, a slight adjustment is made based on the supply-demand elasticity main value of 44788. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 44588, with a range of 44088–45088.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 44588, range 44088–45088. Candidates with rankings at or below the lower limit of 44088 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Marxist Theory A+, History A+); those in the middle of the range are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Computer Science, Economics Dual Degree); those near the upper limit of the range are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Biological Sciences A-, Data Science, etc.), noting that the social popularity of Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraging, so applications should be cautious.
